overall.description: A nighttime walk through a rainy cyberpunk city street in Night City, transitioning from an initial first-person view to third-person gameplay following a character with red hair as they explore the neon-lit sidewalks and approach a homeless encampment with a burning barrel.

segments.scene_description: Walking along a rain-slicked sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, passing a building with combat zone signage and palm trees. The area is dimly lit by street lamps with parked cars visible across the multi-lane street.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with digital advertising billboards

events.description: camera switches to third-person perspective following a character with red hair and white jacket

agents.ego_description: character with red hair walks steadily along the sidewalk past illuminated billboards advertising vehicles and loans

notable_agents.action: red van driving down the wet street, passing by the sidewalk

entered.detail: large curved wall with multiple bright digital advertisements for vehicles and financial services
tall distant buildings with purple and blue neon signage visible through the haze

segments.scene_description: Following a character with red hair past a curved wall of bright digital billboards advertising vehicles. The character walks steadily along the wet pavement as a red van drives by on the adjacent street, with neon-lit skyscrapers visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: homeless encampment with fire barrel under industrial tanks

events.description: character turns off the sidewalk toward a makeshift camp with a burning barrel beneath industrial structures

agents.ego_description: character approaches two individuals gathered around a fire barrel in a makeshift encampment near large industrial tanks

notable_agents.action: man standing by fire barrel warming his hands, wearing a vest with visible tattoos
person sitting on the ground near the fire, leaning against a bag

entered.detail: metal barrel with open fire burning inside, casting warm orange light on the surroundings
large spherical industrial tank with warm accent lighting on its surface
tents and blue tarps set up against a chain-link fence

segments.scene_description: The character turns toward a makeshift encampment beneath large industrial tanks, approaching two individuals gathered around a burning barrel. The fire casts warm orange light against the cool neon of the surrounding city, with tents and makeshift shelters visible against the fence.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a rain-slicked cyberpunk street that transitions from a dimly lit industrial underpass into a vibrant neon district and finally a gritty homeless encampment. It begins with a first-person perspective walking beneath an elevated highway past combat zone signage and palm trees, where street lamps cast a pale glow over parked cars. As the camera shifts to follow a red-haired character, the environment opens up into a corridor of bright digital billboards and towering neon skyscrapers while a red van speeds past on the wet pavement. The scene then turns toward a makeshift settlement sheltered by large industrial tanks, moving closer to a group of people gathered around a burning barrel. This final transition shifts the lighting from the cool blue and pink of the city to a warm orange flicker that illuminates tents and shelters against a perimeter fence.
